<!--
Thanks for contributing to gameplate. If this PR ships a user-visible change,
remember to run `pnpm changeset` and commit the generated file.
-->

## What

<!-- One or two sentences describing the change. -->

## Why

<!-- The motivation: bug, missing feature, API ergonomics, perf, etc. -->

## How

<!-- Notable design choices, tradeoffs, or alternatives considered. -->

## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm test:coverage`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] Tests added/updated for the change
- [ ] Public API changes documented (TSDoc on every exported symbol)
- [ ] Changeset added (`pnpm changeset`) if user-visible
- [ ] README/docs updated if user-facing behavior changed
